  1. org.springframework.ai.model.observation

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.model.observation

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.model.observation
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.chat.observation
Provides the API for chat observations.
org.springframework.ai.embedding.observation
Provides the API for embedding observations.
org.springframework.ai.image.observation
Provides classes for observing image data.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.model.observation used by org.springframework.ai.chat.observation
    Class
    Description
    ModelObservationContext
    Context used when sending a request to a machine learning model and waiting for a response from the model provider.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.model.observation used by org.springframework.ai.embedding.observation
    Class
    Description
    ModelObservationContext
    Context used when sending a request to a machine learning model and waiting for a response from the model provider.

    Context used when sending a request to a machine learning model and waiting for a response from the model provider.
